name: Agent Blackbox
description: Detects prompt-injection, escalation, dependency, file-access, and skill threats from tool calls and prompts, and reports sightings to the local DKG threat graph. Audit-only by default; blocking is opt-in.

hooks.notes: before_agent_run is a conversation hook: OpenClaw requires plugins.entries.blackbox.hooks.allowConversationAccess=true for it to receive the prompt and session messages. Without it, tool-call, message, and session detection still work, but the prompt-injection scan on the incoming run is skipped.

mode.description: audit = observe + report only; block = also block tool calls and runs at or above blockSeverity.

contextGraphId.description: Private (allowlist) curated threat context-graph id on the local DKG node. Defaults to the blackbox staging graph, the current live default (not the old 'umanitek/guardian-threats-staging'). A dedicated 'umanitek/blackbox-threats' production graph may replace it later.

dkgUrl.description: Blackbox-managed local DKG node HTTP URL (override with $BLACKBOX_DKG_DAEMON_URL). Uses a non-default port so it does not collide with a user's own DKG node.

dkgHome.description: Blackbox-managed DKG home that stores this node's config, pid, API token, and cache separately from the DKG CLI default ~/.dkg.

syncInterval.description: Seconds between ruleset refreshes from the node.

report.description: Share sightings to shared working memory (SWM) when a threat matches.

dailyReportLimit.description: Anti-bot cap on outbound sighting reports per day.

reportMinSeverity.description: Minimum severity a built-in heuristic candidate must reach to be flagged/reported. Graph-backed findings (public or community) always flag.

blockSeverity.description: Minimum severity blocked when mode is block. Only public-graph (confirmed) findings can block.

discover.description: Run the built-in discovery nomination layer (candidate injection/escalation/file-access/skill threats).

osvLookup.description: Run OSV dependency auto-discovery off the blocking path.

detection.description: Per-category detection policy. Each of the five categories can be individually disabled or given a minimum severity floor. Omitted categories default to enabled at severity 'info' (flag everything the threat graph knows). Custom protected-path rules bypass this policy.

protectedPaths.description: User-defined protected path patterns (globs / directory prefixes; '~' expands to home). Access to a matching path by a file tool is flagged locally as a critical 'custom' finding — it always flags, blocks in block mode, and is NEVER shared to the community graph. Also accepted under the snake_case key 'protected_paths'. Capped at 100 patterns.

enabled.description: Whether this category is detected at all. false drops every finding in the category.

minSeverity.description: Minimum severity a finding in this category must reach to be flagged/reported. Also accepted as snake_case 'min_severity'.
